commands: cdk -a "ts-node --project tsconfig.lib.json -r tsconfig-paths/register src/bootstrap.ts" deploy sb-bootstrap
docker compose up --force-recreate -d backend workers celery_default celery_beat
NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=4096" TYPEDOC_WATCH=false nx exec -- docusaurus start --port 3006

pnpm run lint:js && pnpm run lint:css
